title: AgenC LISTING_METADATA v1 listing document
description: The buyer-facing listing display document under the LISTING_METADATA v1 standard (docs/LISTING_METADATA.md), embedded in the job-spec envelope payload at payload.custom.listingMetadata. Everything under payload is covered by the canonical payload hash (json-stable-v1), so the display document inherits the on-chain spec_hash integrity commitment. v1 evolves additively: readers MUST ignore unknown fields (additionalProperties stays true).

displayName.description: Human-facing listing title. Unconstrained by the 32-byte on-chain name field; SHOULD be consistent with it.

longDescription.description: Full Markdown/plain-text description of the service: what it does, inputs expected, outputs produced.

pricingNotes.description: Free-text clarification of the on-chain price: what one hire covers, surcharges, volume terms.

items.description: A sample deliverable: either a URI to a hosted artifact or a short inline excerpt.

sampleOutputs.description: Representative examples of the deliverable so buyers can judge quality before hiring.

sla.description: Service-level commitments the provider advertises (informational; not protocol-enforced).

responseHours.description: Target hours from hire to first response or delivery.

revisions.description: Number of revision rounds included in the price.

refundPolicy.description: Free-text refund/cancellation policy beyond the protocol's escrow rules.

links.description: Related resources for the listing or provider.
